ddls:
CREATE TABLE "real_estate_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the real estate transaction */,
  "area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the transaction */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of houses sold in that area */,
  "borough_code" TEXT /* Borough code associated with the area */,
  "houses_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of houses sold in the month */,
  "no_of_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes reported in that month */,
  "borough_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the borough is a high priority area for interventions */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., house, apartment, commercial) */,
  "property_size_sq_m" REAL /* Size of the property in square meters */,
  "number_of_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "number_of_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "property_age" INTEGER /* Age of the property in years */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_data_borough_code FOREIGN KEY ("borough_code") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the borough */,
  "median_household_size" REAL /* Median household size in the borough */,
  "public_transport_access" REAL /* Score indicating the level of public transport access in the borough */,
  "green_space_area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of green spaces in the borough in square kilometers */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level of residents (e.g., high school, college, university) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "borough_code" TEXT /* Code of the borough where the crime occurred */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime reported (e.g., theft, assault) */,
  "total_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes of that type reported */,
  "crime_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime was reported */,
  "crime_location" TEXT /* Specific location where the crime occurred (e.g., street, neighborhood) */,
  "crime_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the crime was reported (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening, night) */,
  "victim_age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "victim_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "suspect_age" INTEGER /* Age of the suspect (if known) */,
  "suspect_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the suspect (if known) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_crime_type FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_borough_code FOREIGN KEY ("borough_code") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type (e.g., Theft, Assault) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime (e.g., minor, moderate, major) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of this type of crime in the city (e.g., rare, occasional, frequent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "borough_code" TEXT /* Code of the borough */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties in that borough */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the average price was recorded */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property for which the average price is recorded */,
  "price_per_sq_m" REAL /* Average price per square meter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_prices_borough_code FOREIGN KEY ("borough_code") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_statistics" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "borough_code" TEXT /* Code of the borough */,
  "houses_sold" INTEGER /* Number of houses sold in the borough */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the sales figures were recorded */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property sold */,
  "average_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Average number of days the property was on the market before being sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_statistics_borough_code FOREIGN KEY ("borough_code") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "borough_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag record */,
  "borough_code" TEXT /* Code of the borough */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flag criteria */,
  "is_high_priority" INTEGER /* Indicator if the borough is considered high priority */,
  "flag_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the flag (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "flag_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the flag was first raised */,
  "flag_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the flag was resolved or removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, public, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "table_accessed" TEXT /* Name of the table that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "borough_code" TEXT /* Code of the borough for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted average property price */,
  "predicted_crimes" INTEGER /* Predicted number of crimes */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction (e.g., 0.85) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property for which the prediction is made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_borough_code FOREIGN KEY ("borough_code") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., market analysis, crime analysis) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the report is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "borough_code" TEXT /* Code of the borough related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price spike, crime surge) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_borough_code FOREIGN KEY ("borough_code") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_code")
)
